extraction.one_line_summary: LAPORTE Christophe won bunch sprint after teams burned energy at intermediate sprint 93km out, beating specialists Bennett and Groenewegen
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma contested intermediate sprint 93km out with full leadout, unusual energy expenditure suggesting jersey calculation over stage-winning priority.
Bora-Hansgrohe deliberately held back until final kilometer, letting rivals Jayco-AlUla burn leadout riders through technical corners.
Multiple crashes in final 3km during slow-paced stage reveal compact peloton from lack of echelon selection creates touchwheel chaos.

rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: Won both intermediate sprint bonus seconds AND stage sprint against pure sprinters, showing rare dual-threat capacity
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: Crashed before finale requiring bike change, then beaten by classics rider Laporte suggesting form deficit
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: neutral: Second place but team delivered late positioning as planned, execution fine but beaten by stronger rider
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Contested intermediate sprint hard but crashed shortly after, bike problems persisted suggesting mechanical fragility or poor equipment prep
